name: MoneyGram
description_short: North Las Vegas MoneyGram at 1807 W Craig Rd offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services in NV.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 1807 W Craig Rd in North Las Vegas, NV is a standalone check-cashing location open Monday through Saturday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, and Sunday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM. The storefront serves North Las Vegas residents and visitors seeking quick financial services in a convenient, accessible location on the city's west side.

At this North Las Vegas MoneyGram location, you can cash checks, transfer money domestically and internationally, pay bills, and handle other essential money services. Staff are available to assist with your transaction needs at 702-633-6521. Whether you need urgent funds or routine financial services, this branch handles check cashing and money transfer transactions for community members.

For North Las Vegas residents, this W Craig Rd location provides convenient access to check-cashing and money services without traveling far. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your check or payment information to complete transactions efficiently. MoneyGram serves as a trusted option for quick check cashing and money transfers throughout the community.
address: 1807 W Craig Rd, North Las Vegas, NV 89032

company_info.headquarters: 1807 W Craig Rd, North Las Vegas, NV 89032

pros: 11 conveniently located service points across North Las Vegas through established retail partners
Extended operating hours, with many CVS locations open until 10-11 PM for after-hours access
Dual service model allowing both online transaction initiation and in-person service
Partnership with major retailers (Walmart, CVS) enables one-stop shopping and services
Both domestic and international money transfer capabilities
Money order and bill payment services in addition to money transfers
No mention of minimum transfer amounts or account requirements to access basic services
cons: Website does not disclose transfer fees, which are typically higher than bank wire transfers
No pricing transparency for international transfers or exchange rates
Service quality and staff expertise likely varies across different retail partner locations
Limited customer service contact information provided on location finder page
No information about fraud protection, dispute resolution processes, or service guarantees
best_for: Customers needing convenient evening or weekend money transfer access near retail locations
Unbanked or underbanked consumers lacking traditional bank accounts for wire transfers
Individuals sending money internationally to family or friends with preference for in-person service
People seeking money orders or bill payment services combined with retail shopping
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who prioritize convenience and extended hours over lowest cost, and who prefer or need in-person service for money transfers and payment services. The main caveat is that actual fees, rates, and terms are entirely absent from the website, requiring customers to contact individual locations directly for pricing information before making transfer decisions.
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1807 W Craig Rd, North Las Vegas, NV. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services.
